translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Peter, an apostle of Jesus Christ, to the chosen ones who are living as foreigners in the Dispersion in Pontus, Galatia, Cappadocia, Asia, and Bithynia,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: according to the foreknowledge of God the Father, in sanctification of the Spirit, that you may obey Jesus Christ and be sprinkled with his blood: Grace to you and peace be multiplied.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Blessed be the God and Father of our Lord Jesus Christ, who according to his great mercy caused us to be born again to a living hope through the resurrection of Jesus Christ from the dead,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: to an incorruptible and undefiled inheritance that doesn’t fade away, reserved in Heaven for you,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: who by the power of God are guarded through faith for a salvation ready to be revealed in the last time.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Wherein you greatly rejoice, though now for a little while, if need be, you have been put to grief in various trials,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: that the proof of your faith, which is more precious than gold that perishes even though it is tested by fire, may be found to result in praise, glory, and honor at the revelation of Jesus Christ —

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: whom not having known you love; in whom, though now you don’t see him, yet believing, you rejoice greatly with joy unspeakable and full of glory —

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: receiving the result of your faith, the salvation of your souls.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Concerning this salvation, the prophets sought and searched diligently, who prophesied of the grace that would come to you,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: searching for who or what kind of time the Spirit of Christ, which was in them, pointed to, when he predicted the sufferings of Christ, and the glories that would follow them.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: To them it was revealed, that not to themselves, but to you, they ministered these things, which now have been announced to you through those who preached the Good News to you by the Holy Spirit sent out from heaven; which things angels desire to look into.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Therefore prepare your minds for action,  be sober, and set your hope fully on the grace that will be brought to you at the revelation of Jesus Christ —

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: as children of obedience, not conforming yourselves according to your former lusts as in your ignorance,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: but just as he who called you is holy, you yourselves also be holy in all of your behavior;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: because it is written, “You shall be holy; for I am holy.”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: If you call on him as Father, who without respect of persons judges according to each man’s work, pass the time of your living as foreigners here in reverent fear:

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: knowing that you were redeemed, not with corruptible things, with silver or gold, from the useless way of life handed down from your fathers,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: but with precious blood, as of a lamb without blemish or spot, the blood of Christ;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: who was foreknown indeed before the foundation of the world, but was revealed in this last age for your sake,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: who through him are believers in God, who raised him from the dead, and gave him glory; so that your faith and hope might be in God.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Seeing you have purified your souls in your obedience to the truth through the Spirit in sincere brotherly affection, love one another from the heart fervently:

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: having been born again, not of corruptible seed, but of incorruptible, through the word of God, which lives and remains forever.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For, “All flesh is like grass, and all of man’s glory like the flower in the grass. The grass withers, and its flower falls;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: but the Lord’s word endures forever.”   This is the word of Good News which was preached to you.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Putting away therefore all wickedness, all deceit, hypocrisies, envies, and all evil speaking,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: as newborn babies, long for the pure milk of the Word, that with it you may grow,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: if indeed you have tasted that the Lord is gracious:

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: coming to him, a living stone, rejected indeed by men, but chosen by God, precious.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: You also, as living stones, are built up as a spiritual house, to be a holy priesthood, to offer up spiritual sacrifices, acceptable to God through Jesus Christ.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Because it is contained in Scripture, “Behold,  I lay in Zion a chief cornerstone, chosen, and precious: He who believes in him will not be disappointed.”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For you who believe therefore is the honor, but for those who are disobedient, “The stone which the builders rejected, has become the chief cornerstone,”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: and, “a stone of stumbling, and a rock of offense.”   For they stumble at the word, being disobedient, to which also they were appointed.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: But you are a chosen race, a royal priesthood, a holy nation, a people for God’s own possession, that you may proclaim the excellence of him who called you out of darkness into his marvelous light:

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: who in time past were no people, but now are God’s people, who had not obtained mercy, but now have obtained mercy.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Beloved, I beg you as foreigners and pilgrims, to abstain from fleshly lusts, which war against the soul;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: having good behavior among the nations, so in that of which they speak against you as evildoers, they may by your good works, which they see, glorify God in the day of visitation.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Therefore subject yourselves to every ordinance of man for the Lord’s sake: whether to the king, as supreme;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: or to governors, as sent by him for vengeance on evildoers and for praise to those who do well.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For this is the will of God, that by well-doing you should put to silence the ignorance of foolish men:

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: as free, and not using your freedom for a cloak of wickedness, but as bondservants of God.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Honor all men. Love the brotherhood. Fear God. Honor the king.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Servants, be in subjection to your masters with all fear; not only to the good and gentle, but also to the wicked.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For it is commendable if someone endures pain, suffering unjustly, because of conscience toward God.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For what glory is it if, when you sin, you patiently endure beating? But if, when you do well, you patiently endure suffering, this is commendable with God.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For to this you were called, because Christ also suffered for us, leaving you  an example, that you should follow his steps,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: who did not sin, “neither was deceit found in his mouth.”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Who, when he was cursed, didn’t curse back. When he suffered, didn’t threaten, but committed himself to him who judges righteously;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: who his own self bore our sins in his body on the tree, that we, having died to sins, might live to righteousness; by whose stripes you were healed.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For you were going astray like sheep; but now have returned to the Shepherd and Overseer  of your souls.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: In the same way, wives, be in subjection to your own husbands; so that, even if any don’t obey the Word, they may be won by the behavior of their wives without a word;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: seeing your pure behavior in fear.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Let your beauty be not just the outward adorning of braiding the hair, and of wearing jewels of gold, or of putting on fine clothing;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: but in the hidden person of the heart, in the incorruptible adornment of a gentle and quiet spirit, which is in the sight of God very precious.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For this is how the holy women before, who hoped in God also adorned themselves, being in subjection to their own husbands:

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: as Sarah obeyed Abraham, calling him lord, whose children you now are, if you do well, and are not put in fear by any terror.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: You husbands, in the same way, live with your wives according to knowledge, giving honor to the woman, as to the weaker vessel, as being also joint heirs of the grace of life; that your prayers may not be hindered.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Finally, be all like-minded, compassionate, loving as brothers, tender hearted, courteous,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: not rendering evil for evil, or insult for insult; but instead blessing; knowing that to this were you called, that you may inherit a blessing.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For, “He who would love life, and see good days, let him keep his tongue from evil, and his lips from speaking deceit.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Let him turn away from evil, and do good. Let him seek peace, and pursue it.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For the eyes of the Lord are on the righteous, and his ears open to their prayer; but the face of the Lord is against those who do evil.”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Now who is he who will harm you, if you become imitators of that which is good?

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: But even if you should suffer for righteousness’ sake, you are blessed. “Don’t fear what they fear, neither be troubled.”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: But sanctify the Lord God in your hearts; and always be ready to give an answer to everyone who asks you a reason concerning the hope that is in you, with humility and fear:

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: having a good conscience; that, while you are spoken against as evildoers, they may be disappointed who curse your good way of life in Christ.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For it is better, if it is God’s will, that you suffer for doing well than for doing evil.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Because Christ also suffered for sins once, the righteous for the unrighteous, that he might bring you to God; being put to death in the flesh, but made alive in the spirit;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: in which he also went and preached to the spirits in prison,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: who before were disobedient, when God waited patiently in the days of Noah, while the ship was being built. In it, few, that is, eight souls, were saved through water.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: This is a symbol of baptism, which now saves you — not the putting away of the filth of the flesh, but the answer of a good conscience toward God, through the resurrection of Jesus Christ,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: who is at the right hand of God, having gone into heaven, angels and authorities and powers being made subject to him.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Therefore, since Christ suffered for us in the flesh, arm yourselves also with the same mind; for he who has suffered in the flesh has ceased from sin;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: that you no longer should live the rest of your time in the flesh for the lusts of men, but for the will of God.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For we have spent enough of our past time doing the desire of the Gentiles, and having walked in lewdness, lusts, drunken binges, orgies, carousings, and abominable idolatries.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: They think it is strange that you don’t run with them into the same excess of riot, blaspheming:

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: who will give account to him who is ready to judge the living and the dead.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For to this end the Good News was preached even to the dead, that they might be judged indeed as men in the flesh, but live as to God in the spirit.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: But the end of all things is near. Therefore be of sound mind, self-controlled, and sober in prayer.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: And above all things be earnest in your love among yourselves, for love covers a multitude of sins.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Be hospitable to one another without grumbling.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: As each has received a gift, employ it in serving one another, as good managers of the grace of God in its various forms.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: If anyone speaks, let it be as it were the very words of God. If anyone serves, let it be as of the strength which God supplies, that in all things God may be glorified through Jesus Christ, to whom belong the glory and the dominion forever and ever. Amen.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Beloved, don’t be astonished at the fiery trial which has come upon you, to test you, as though a strange thing happened to you.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: But because you are partakers of Christ’s sufferings, rejoice; that at the revelation of his glory you also may rejoice with exceeding joy.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: If you are insulted for the name of Christ, you are blessed; because the Spirit of glory and of God rests on you. On their part he is blasphemed, but on your part he is glorified.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For let none of you suffer as a murderer, or a thief, or an evil doer, or a meddler in other men’s matters.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: But if one of you suffers for being a Christian, let him not be ashamed; but let him glorify God in this matter.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For the time has come for judgment to begin with the household of God. If it begins first with us, what will happen to those who don’t obey the Good News of God?

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: “If it is hard for the righteous to be saved, what will happen to the ungodly and the sinner?”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Therefore let them also who suffer according to the will of God in doing good entrust their souls to him, as to a faithful Creator.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Therefore I exhort the elders among you, as a fellow elder, and a witness of the sufferings of Christ, and who will also share in the glory that will be revealed.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Shepherd the flock of God which is among you, exercising the oversight, not under compulsion, but voluntarily, not for dishonest gain, but willingly;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: neither as lording it over those entrusted to you, but making yourselves examples to the flock.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: When the chief Shepherd is revealed, you will receive the crown of glory that doesn’t fade away.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Likewise, you younger ones, be subject to the elder. Yes, all of you clothe yourselves with humility, to subject yourselves to one another; for “God resists the proud, but gives grace to the humble.”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Humble yourselves therefore under the mighty hand of God, that he may exalt you in due time;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: casting all your worries on him, because he cares for you.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Be sober and self-controlled. Be watchful. Your adversary, the devil, walks around like a roaring lion, seeking whom he may devour.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Withstand him steadfast in your faith, knowing that your brothers who are in the world are undergoing the same sufferings.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: But may the God of all grace, who called you to his eternal glory by Christ Jesus, after you have suffered a little while, perfect, establish, strengthen, and settle you.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: To him be the glory and the power forever and ever. Amen.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Through Silvanus, our faithful brother, as I consider him, I have written to you briefly, exhorting, and testifying that this is the true grace of God in which you stand.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: She who is in Babylon, chosen together with you, greets you; and so does Mark, my son.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Greet one another with a kiss of love. Peace be to you all who are in Christ Jesus. Amen.
